name: Agonizing Blast
description: Add your Charisma modifier to the damage of your eldritch blast.

name: Armor of Shadows
description: Cast mage armor on yourself at will, without using a spell slot.

name: Beast Speech
description: Cast speak with animals at will.

name: Beguiling Influence
description: Gain proficiency in Deception and Persuasion.

name: Book of Ancient Secrets
description: Inscribe and cast ritual spells from your Book of Shadows.

name: Devil's Sight
description: See normally in magical and nonmagical darkness out to 120 ft.

name: Eldritch Sight
description: Cast detect magic at will, without a spell slot.

name: Eldritch Spear
description: Your eldritch blast's range becomes 300 ft.

name: Eyes of the Rune Keeper
description: You can read all writing.

name: Fiendish Vigor
description: Cast false life on yourself at will as a 1st-level spell.

name: Gaze of Two Minds
description: Touch a willing humanoid to perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn.

name: Mask of Many Faces
description: Cast disguise self at will.

name: Misty Visions
description: Cast silent image at will.

name: Repelling Blast
description: When you hit a creature with eldritch blast, push it up to 10 ft away.

name: Thief of Five Fates
description: Cast bane once using a warlock spell slot; regain on a long rest.

name: Voice of the Chain Master
description: Communicate with and perceive through your familiar at any distance.

name: Mire the Mind
description: Cast slow once using a warlock spell slot; regain on a long rest.

name: One with Shadows
description: In dim light or darkness, become invisible until you move or take an action.

name: Sign of Ill Omen
description: Cast bestow curse once using a warlock spell slot; regain on a long rest.

name: Thirsting Blade
description: Attack twice with your pact weapon when you take the Attack action.

name: Investment of the Chain Master
description: Your familiar gains a flying or swimming speed, can attack as a bonus action with magical strikes, uses your spell save DC, and you can take damage in its place.

name: Bewitching Whispers
description: Cast compulsion once using a warlock spell slot; regain on a long rest.

name: Dreadful Word
description: Cast confusion once using a warlock spell slot; regain on a long rest.

name: Sculptor of Flesh
description: Cast polymorph once using a warlock spell slot; regain on a long rest.

name: Ascendant Step
description: Cast levitate on yourself at will, without a spell slot.

name: Minions of Chaos
description: Cast conjure elemental once using a warlock spell slot; regain on a long rest.

name: Otherworldly Leap
description: Cast jump on yourself at will, without a spell slot.

name: Whispers of the Grave
description: Cast speak with dead at will.

name: Lifedrinker
description: Your pact weapon deals extra necrotic damage equal to your Charisma modifier.

name: Chains of Carceri
description: Cast hold monster at will on celestials, elementals, and fiends without a slot.

name: Master of Myriad Forms
description: Cast alter self at will.

name: Visions of Distant Realms
description: Cast arcane eye at will.

name: Witch Sight
description: See the true form of shapechangers or creatures concealed by illusion within 30 ft.
